description: An information bounty — a request for specific information about a megaproject (webcam footage, progress photos, on-the-ground reports, etc.). Other users can fulfill requests.

main.description: A bounty request posted by a user seeking specific information about a megaproject. The request describes what information is needed and optionally offers a reward. Anyone can fulfill it by creating a fulfillment record.

projectRef.description: AT URI of the com.minomobi.mega.project record this request is about

projectName.description: Denormalized project name for display without resolving the reference

title.description: Short title describing the request (e.g., 'Current webcam feed for Brenner Base Tunnel south portal')

description.description: Detailed description of what information is needed and any requirements

expiresAt.description: When this request expires if unfulfilled

fulfilledBy.description: AT URI of the fulfillment record that satisfied this request

amount.description: Bounty amount in the specified currency

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code or 'REPUTATION' for non-monetary bounties

paymentMethod.description: How the bounty will be paid (e.g., 'PayPal', 'Lightning', 'Venmo')
